testcase.name: 表单渲染所有字段: AcquisitionVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > imports and uses ToolForm with toolKey acquisition-video
表单渲染所有字段: AcquisitionVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolForm has acquisition-video case with sourceCopy textarea and conversionGoal input
表单渲染所有字段: AcquisitionVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolForm acquisition-video case has platform select and duration select
表单渲染所有字段: AcquisitionVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > AcquisitionVideo page uses acquisitionVideoFrontendInput schema
表单渲染所有字段: AcquisitionVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > submitLabel 生成方案
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > conversionGoal 留空 → 转化目标必填
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > sourceCopy min 10 → 中文 error message
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > valid input with required fields passes
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > valid input with all fields passes
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > empty string duration preprocessed to undefined — valid
submit 调 trpc.acquisitionVideo.generate.useMutation > AcquisitionVideo page calls trpc.acquisitionVideo.generate.useMutation
submit 调 trpc.acquisitionVideo.generate.useMutation > mutation result is passed to AcquisitionVideoResult
submit 调 trpc.acquisitionVideo.generate.useMutation > AcquisitionVideo page renders FeedbackButton with VideoAgent
submit 调 trpc.acquisitionVideo.generate.useMutation > ToolResult switch includes acquisition-video case
LS 写入 + 读取 (D-031 · SHIELD REJ-010) > getToolLsKey generates correct namespaced key for acquisition-video
LS 写入 + 读取 (D-031 · SHIELD REJ-010) > ToolForm handles LS for acquisition-video toolKey via getToolLsKey
LS 写入 + 读取 (D-031 · SHIELD REJ-010) > AcquisitionVideoResult renders CTA card with data-testid
?historyId 预填 > AcquisitionVideo page reads historyId from searchParams
?historyId 预填 > AcquisitionVideo page calls trpc.history.detail.useQuery with historyId
?historyId 预填 > historyDefaults uses inputSummary for sourceCopy pre-fill
?historyId 预填 > AcquisitionVideoResult handles JSON.parse failure → 解析失败
?historyId 预填 > AcquisitionVideoResult renders conversion-path section
